channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Watch: Innovative strategies the wine industry is using to adapt to climate change
item.description: Human-caused climate change is forcing the wine industry to change its approach.

item.title: Despite scrutiny, special education funds flow to for-profit residential treatment centers
Judge rules detained pregnant woman and son cannot spend another night at DC airport
item.description: A judge ordered that a pregnant woman and her young son from Ghana cannot stay another night at a DC-area airport where they have been detained.

item.title: No tax charges filed in SPLC probe after IRS lawyers found informant program lawful
item.description: FBI and IRS agents investigated the SPLC's paid informant program starting in Trump's first term.
